headline: Environmental and Facilities Services Stocks Q1 Highlights: Rollins (NYSE:ROL)
summary: As the Q1 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the environmental and facilities services industry, including Rollins (NYSE:ROL) and its peers.

headline: Rollins is Set to Report Q2 Earnings: Here's What You Should Know
summary: ROL heads into Q2 earnings release with revenues and EPS expected to rise, supported by acquisitions, market expansion, cross-selling and pricing.

headline: Rollins (ROL) Q2 Earnings on the Horizon: Analysts' Insights on Key Performance Measures
summary: Evaluate the expected performance of Rollins (ROL) for the quarter ended June 2026, looking beyond the conventional Wall Street top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining some of its key metrics for better insight.
